title: Jharkhand Academic Council Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Jharkhand Academic Council Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Jharkhand Academic Council Result 2026 declared for Class 10th Board Exam on the official website - jac.jharkhand.gov.in on 23-04-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the JAC 10th Result 2026 marksheet online.

content.text: Jharkhand Academic Council (JAC), Ranchi has officially released the JAC 10th Result 2026 for Class 10 students for the 2025-26 academic session. The Jharkhand Board Class 10 result has been announced for all students who appeared in the annual matriculation examinations conducted by JAC.

JAC Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - jac.jharkhand.gov.in. Students can check and download their Jharkhand Board Class 10 marksheet by visiting the JAC result portal jacresults.com and logging in using their roll code and roll number printed on the admit card. After downloading the provisional marksheet, students are advised to carefully verify their name, roll details, subject-wise marks, total marks and result status, and contact their school or JAC authorities in case of any discrepancy.

sections.heading: Jharkhand Academic Council Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: Jharkhand Academic Council has published the JAC 10th Result 2026 online for lakhs of Class 10 students who appeared in the Jharkhand Board matric exams. The JAC matric result is available on the official websites jacresults.com and jac.jharkhand.gov.in, where students can log in with their roll code and roll number to download their scorecard. The online marksheet is provisional and will be valid for immediate reference until the original mark sheet is issued by schools.

JAC has activated the direct link to check JAC 10th Result 2026 on its official result portal for all Class 10 students. Using the Jharkhand Board Matric Result 2026 direct link, students can quickly open the result page, enter their roll code and roll number and download their online marksheet. The table below provides the official link for JAC 10th Result 2026 as available on the JAC result website.

links.label: JAC 10th Result 2026 - Jharkhand Board Class 10 Matric Result

content.text: Follow the steps below to check the Jharkhand Board JAC 10th Result 2026 online in a simple and error-free manner.

items: Visit the official Jharkhand Academic Council website jac.jharkhand.gov.in or directly open the result portal jacresults.com.
On the result page, click on the link that reads "JAC Annual Secondary Examination Result 2026" or "JAC 10th Result 2026".
A new result login page will open on the screen.
Enter your Roll Code and Roll Number exactly as printed on your JAC Class 10 admit card.
Double-check the entered details and click on the "Submit" or "View Result" button.
Your JAC 10th Result 2026 marksheet will be displayed with subject-wise marks, total marks, division and overall result status.
Download the online marksheet and take a printout for future admission and documentation purposes until the original mark sheet is issued by your school.

structured_links.label: JAC 10th Result 2026 - Jharkhand Board Class 10 Matric Result
